rulings.Case Title: DAVID SALMA et al VS. RUBEN DIEGO Q PICARDO et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 15, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT KATRINA RODRIGUEZ MONTINOLA's DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the Fourth Cause of Action for Fraud and Conspiracy to Commit Fraud. Fails to allege elements of fraud and conspiracy. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID SALMA et al VS. RUBEN DIEGO Q PICARDO et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 15, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT KATRINA RODRIGUEZ MONTINOLA's Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' Fourth Amended Complaint DENIED as moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNA BANKS VS. GREEN OASIS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Richard Tom'S Motion To Strike Complaint On Court'S Own Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 15, 2015, line 2. Defendant Richard Tom's Motion To Strike Complaint On Court's Own Motion DENIED as moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNA BANKS VS. GREEN OASIS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 15, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT RICHARD TOM's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to the 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 6th, 8th, and 9th Causes of Action. Plaintiff to plead with more specificity as to Tom's relationship and involvement with Green Oasis as to the commercial lease. It appears that Tom is not a signatory party to the underlying lease at issue. As to 5th and 7th Causes of Action, Plaintiff will dismiss those claims. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AESTHETIC DENTAL CENTER OF UNION SQUARE, INC., VS. 490 POST STREET, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED et al
